note: Field NAMES/TYPES/semantics are authoritative; OFFSETS/SIZES are per the tagged build and may differ from the X360 spine — verify layout against pseudocode/asm. 'primary':true == Paradise/PS3/X360-era page.

fields.name: Format
fields.desc: A DXGI_FORMAT enumeration specifying the format the texture will be in after it is loaded.

fields.name: Width
fields.desc: The target width of the texture. If the actual width of the texture is larger or smaller than this value then the texture will be scaled up or down to fit this target width.

fields.name: Height
fields.desc: The target height of the texture. If the actual height of the texture is larger or smaller than this value then the texture will be scaled up or down to fit this target height.

fields.name: Depth
fields.desc: The depth of the texture. This only applies to volume textures.

fields.name: ArraySize
fields.desc: The number of elements in the array.

fields.name: MostDetailedMip
fields.desc: Index of the most detailed mipmap level to use.

fields.name: MipLevels
fields.desc: The maximum number of mipmap levels in the texture.

fields.name: mpaPlayerCarIds
fields.desc: Cars the player starts the game with

fields.name: mbIsNewModule
fields.desc:
Indicates the module was just constructed.
In practice, this is usually left set except in the game module.
Combined size of all joint data for one keyframe

fields.name: RenderTarget
fields.desc: An array of D3D11_RENDER_TARGET_BLEND_DESC structures that describe the blend states for render targets; these correspond to the eight render targets that can be bound to the [https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/direct3d11/d3d10-graphics-programming-guide-output-merger-stage output-merger stage] at one time.

fields.name: AlphaToCoverageEnable
fields.desc: Specifies whether to use alpha-to-coverage as a multisampling technique when setting a pixel to a render target.

fields.name: IndependentBlendEnable
fields.desc: Specifies whether to enable independent blending in simultaneous render targets. Set to TRUE to enable independent blending. If set to FALSE, only the RenderTarget[0] members are used; RenderTarget[1..7] are ignored.

fields.name: DepthFunc
fields.desc: A function that compares depth data against existing depth data.

fields.name: FrontFace
fields.desc: Identify how to use the results of the depth test and the stencil test for pixels whose surface normal is facing towards the camera.

fields.name: BackFace
fields.desc: Identify how to use the results of the depth test and the stencil test for pixels whose surface normal is facing away from the camera.

fields.name: StencilReadMask
fields.desc: Identify a portion of the depth-stencil buffer for reading stencil data.

fields.name: StencilWriteMask
fields.desc: Identify a portion of the depth-stencil buffer for writing stencil data.

fields.name: FillMode
fields.desc: Determines the fill mode to use when rendering.

fields.name: CullMode
fields.desc: Indicates triangles facing the specified direction are not drawn.

fields.name: FrontCounterClockwise
fields.desc: Determines if a triangle is front- or back-facing. If this parameter is TRUE, a triangle will be considered front-facing if its vertices are counter-clockwise on the render target and considered back-facing if they are clockwise. If this parameter is FALSE, the opposite is true.

fields.name: DepthBias
fields.desc: Depth value added to a given pixel.

fields.name: DepthBiasClamp
fields.desc: Maximum depth bias of a pixel.

fields.name: SlopeScaledDepthBias
fields.desc: Scalar on a given pixel's slope.

fields.name: ScissorEnable
fields.desc: Enable scissor-rectangle culling. All pixels outside an active scissor rectangle are culled.

fields.name: MultisampleEnable
fields.desc: Specifies whether to use the quadrilateral or alpha line anti-aliasing algorithm on multisample antialiasing (MSAA) render targets. Set to TRUE to use the quadrilateral line anti-aliasing algorithm and to FALSE to use the alpha line anti-aliasing algorithm.

fields.name: AntialiasedLineEnable
fields.desc: Specifies whether to enable line antialiasing; only applies if doing line drawing and MultisampleEnable is FALSE.

fields.name: D3DCOLOR

fields.desc: The stencil operation to perform when stencil testing and depth testing both pass.

fields.desc: A function that compares stencil data against existing stencil data.

fields.name: Ambient lighting color (tunnel)
fields.desc:
All values from here to 0x138 (as well as 0x144's value) are
only applied to the vehicle when it has entered a tunnel or overpass.

fields.desc: Intensity of the specular lighting applied to the vehicle.

Number of primary actions in this sequence.
